mcp-toolset
***********


Description
===========

Allows the creation, configuration and management of an MCP Toolset.


Available Commands
==================

* add-lock

* change-compartment

* create-mcp-toolset-built-in-sql-tools

* create-mcp-toolset-custom-sql-tool

* create-mcp-toolset-customizable-reporting-tools

* create-mcp-toolset-gen-ai-sql-assistant

* delete

* get

* list

* remove-lock

* update-mcp-toolset-built-in-sql-tools

* update-mcp-toolset-custom-sql-tool

* update-mcp-toolset-customizable-reporting-tools

* update-mcp-toolset-gen-ai-sql-assistant
